en: I saw my very first psychotherapy client.
I was a PhD student in clinical psychology at Berkeley.
ko: 나는 버클리에서 임상 심리학 박사 과정 중이었어.

en: She was a 26-year-old woman named Alex.
Now, Alex walked into her first session
wearing jeans and a big slouchy top.
And she dropped onto the couch in my office
ko: 그리고 내 사무실 소파에 털썩 주저앉았고

en: and told me she was there to talk about guy problems.
ko: 그녀는 남자 문제에 대해 이야기하러 왔다고 말했어.

en: My classmate got an arsonist for her first client.
ko: 내 동급생은 첫 클라이언트로 방화범을 받았거든.

en: And I got a 20-something who wanted to talk about boys.
ko: 나는 남자에 대해 이야기하고 싶어하는 20대 초반을 받았어.

en: This, I thought I could handle.
ko: 이건 내가 다룰 수 있을 거라고 생각했어.

en: With the funny stories that Alex would bring to session, it was easy for me to...
ko: 알렉스가 세션에 가져오는 재미있는 이야기들 덕분에, 나는 쉽게...
